tasks.title: Expose stable public read API on HoldemHand
tasks.description: Refactor backend/app/engine/holdem.py to provide public accessor methods for current actor, phase, pot, community cards, initial events, seat lookup, and public snapshot data so callers no longer need to reach into private engine fields.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: HoldemHand exposes public methods for all state currently consumed by table_manager
AC-2: Public methods cover seat resolution and event/bootstrap data needed by persistence
AC-3: No behavior change in hand execution logic
GATE: engine tests continue passing

tasks.title: Refactor table_manager to stop using engine internals
tasks.description: Update backend/app/services/table_manager.py to consume only the new public HoldemHand API, extract event/persistence mapping helpers where useful, and remove all direct access to hand._* internals.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: table_manager contains no references to private HoldemHand attributes
AC-2: Event persistence still records blinds, actions, and hand completion correctly
AC-3: Game state responses remain functionally equivalent
GATE: grep for 'hand._' outside backend/app/engine returns nothing relevant

tasks.title: Introduce backend query services
tasks.description: Create dedicated query service modules for agent history, leaderboard, matches, and sessions to own read-side joins, eager loading, aggregation, and response shaping. Keep mutation logic in existing service modules.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Agent history reads are implemented in agent_queries
AC-2: Leaderboard reads are implemented in leaderboard_queries
AC-3: Match list/live reads are implemented in match_queries
AC-4: Session list/detail reads are implemented in session_queries
GATE: new query service modules import without errors

tasks.title: Move router read logic onto query services and schemas
tasks.description: Refactor backend routers and any overloaded read services so agent, leaderboard, matches, and sessions endpoints delegate to query services and return stable schema-aligned payloads instead of inline dict assembly and ad hoc naming.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Main routers no longer build complex response dicts inline
AC-2: Response naming is consistent across similar endpoints
AC-3: Read-side logic is removed from agent_service where it no longer belongs
AC-4: Endpoints validate against stable response schemas
GATE: endpoint contract tests pass

tasks.title: Eliminate obvious N+1 query patterns in hot endpoints
tasks.description: Optimize hot backend read paths using selectinload, joins, or aggregate queries so leaderboard, session history, and match views do not execute per-row lookup queries for arena, owner, rival, or ranking data.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: user leaderboard does not query agents per listed user row
AC-2: agent leaderboard does not query owner per listed row
AC-3: agent history and sessions views avoid per-item arena/opponent lookups
GATE: integration checks confirm reduced query fan-out or equivalent eager loading

tasks.title: Add contextual logging for recoverable backend read/build failures
tasks.description: Improve observability in backend services and scheduler-adjacent read paths by replacing broad silent exception handling with structured logging that includes resource identifiers and operation context.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Recoverable exceptions are logged with context
AC-2: No silent catch blocks remain in targeted backend read/build paths
AC-3: Logging does not alter endpoint contracts
GATE: grep for empty catch/pass patterns in targeted files returns nothing relevant
